hero.headline: Your Voice. Your Language. Perfectly Written.
hero.subheadline: Professional audio transcription, formatting, and translation for Indian languages — built for serious writing.

howItWorks.title: Upload or Record
howItWorks.description: Upload an audio file (MP3, WAV, M4A) or record live audio directly in the browser — up to 30 minutes.

howItWorks.title: AI Transcription
howItWorks.description: Powered by Sarvam AI — India's leading speech model — with exceptional accuracy for Indic languages.

howItWorks.title: Edit & Format
howItWorks.description: Use the rich text editor and 109 voice formatting commands to structure your document while you speak.

howItWorks.title: Export & Share
howItWorks.description: Download as DOCX or PDF. Translate to another Indian language with one click.

features.title: Dictate. Transcribe. Format. Translate.
features.description: Everything in one seamless workflow — from raw audio to a polished, formatted document.

features.title: Powered by an Advanced Indian LLM
features.description: Built specifically for Marathi, Hindi, and other Indic languages. Not a generic model.

features.title: Live or Recorded Audio
features.description: Speak in real time or upload audio — your choice. Supports up to 30-minute recordings.

features.title: Voice-Controlled Formatting
features.description: Say "new line", "bold on", "new page" — and structure your document as you speak.

features.title: One-Click Indian Language Translation
features.description: Instantly convert your content across multiple Indian languages with Sarvam AI Translate.

features.title: Private. Secure. Sovereign.
features.description: All data encrypted and stored in Mumbai, India. Download outputs directly to your device.

video.title: See IndoScribe in Action
video.description: Watch how professionals use IndoScribe to transcribe, edit, and export Indic language audio in minutes.

testimonials.quote: IndoScribe has transformed how I document my research. The Marathi transcription accuracy is remarkable — far better than anything I've tried before.
testimonials.author: Dr. Priya Kulkarni

testimonials.quote: I use it daily for legal dictation in Hindi. The voice formatting commands alone save me two hours every day.
testimonials.author: Adv. Suresh Patil

testimonials.quote: Finally a transcription tool that understands Marathi the way we actually speak it. The DOCX export is publication-ready.
testimonials.author: Rahul Mehta
